art_market.summary: Several major exhibitions conclude today, March 22, 2026, marking a transition point in Seoul's exhibition calendar.

My Very Favorite - Thousand-Character Classic (Seoul Calligraphy Art Museum)
Klimt and Ricci Oddi Miracle (The My Art Museum)
ongoing: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,781.2 as of Friday, March 20, 2026. The market is facing volatility concerns with potential overheating after a year-long rally.

key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Retail vs. Foreign investor split; new Commercial Act treasury share cancellation rules impacting major conglomerates.
key_indicators.Outlook: Continued focus on corporate governance reforms and addressing the 'Korea discount'.
